# Benchmark TCG â€” Public Updates

This repository publishes **only** the Windows installer and updater manifest for [Benchmark TCG](https://github.com/fluffymcgooglypoo-art/pokevault-v2) (private source).

## Download the app

On each [Release](https://github.com/fluffymcgooglypoo-art/benchmark-tcg-updates/releases), download:

**`Benchmark.TCG_X.Y.Z_x64-setup.exe`** (package icon)

That is the installer. Use **Check for updates** inside the installed app for automatic updates.

## Ignore these links (GitHub auto-generated)

GitHub **always** adds **Source code (zip)** and **Source code (tar.gz)** on every Release. We cannot remove them. They are **not** the application source â€” they are a tiny snapshot of this repo (`README` + `latest.json` only).

**Real source code** is private: `https://github.com/fluffymcgooglypoo-art/pokevault-v2`

## Updater manifest

Installed apps read:

`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fluffymcgooglypoo-art/benchmark-tcg-updates/main/latest.json`
